releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
###   📢 BREAKING CHANGES
- **Plugin relaunch**: since the next major version (v4) would have introduced breaking changes anyway, and the project focus has shifted from manual sorting only to a broader file explorer enhancement suite, the plugin is being republished under a more versatile name: **Flexplorer**. The **Manual Sorting** plugin will be unpublished soon.

###   🎁 Features
- **Per-folder sorting**: each folder now maintains its own independent sorting mode. [#40](https://github.com/kh4f/flexplorer/issues/40)
- **Pinning & hiding**: items can now be pinned to the top or hidden from view. [#124](https://github.com/kh4f/flexplorer/issues/124) [#146](https://github.com/kh4f/flexplorer/issues/146)
- **Extended context menu**: explorer items now include `Pin`, `Hide`, and `Sort order` options.
- **Enhanced sort order menu**: the native `Change sort order` menu now includes `Custom order` sorting mode, `Save as custom order` action, and `Show hidden` toggle.
- **Smarter auto-scroll**: improved auto-scroll dynamics for faster and more flexible dragging near explorer edges. [#135](https://github.com/kh4f/flexplorer/issues/135)
- **Sync-friendly persistence**: added a setting to control whether `data.json` updates immediately after file create/delete operations, helping reduce sync conflicts with services like Obsidian Sync. [#120](https://github.com/kh4f/flexplorer/issues/120)

###   ⚡ Performance
- **Rewritten DnD engine**: drag‑and‑drop logic has been rebuilt from scratch for improved reliability and performance.

###   🧩 Compatibility
- **File Explorer Note Count compatibility**: fixed the drag handles overlapping folder child counters on mobile. [#125](https://github.com/kh4f/flexplorer/issues/125)
- **Novel Word Count compatibility**: resolved visual conflict with word counter on mobile. [#165](https://github.com/kh4f/flexplorer/issues/165)

###   🎨 Style
- **Cleaner drag visuals**: removed tooltip, folder highlight, drop zones, indicator animation, and mobile drag handles for a more minimal, smooth and distraction‑free drag experience.

#####    [Full Changelog](https://github.com/kh4f/flexplorer/compare/3.2.4...4.0.0)  •  May 23, 2026

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

#####    [_Full Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.2.3...3.2.4)  •  _Jan 21, 2026_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> The upcoming **v4.0.0** (planned for no earlier than **Jan 5, 2026**) will introduce breaking changes, but **v3.2** includes automatic migration to the new settings format and ensures compatibility with v4.
> 
> **To preserve your custom sorting order, please update to v3.2 before installing v4.0.0.**

###      🩹 Fixes
- **Fixed RMB drag activation**: holding the right mouse button no longer triggers drag & drop.
- **Reliable drop zone cleanup**: drop zones now always clear when releasing the mouse, even outside Obsidian or after opening context menus on Mac. (#114)

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--323-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.2.2...3.2.3)  •  _Dec 26, 2025_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> The upcoming **v4.0.0** (planned for **Jan 5, 2026**) will introduce breaking changes, but **v3.2** includes automatic migration to the new settings format and ensures compatibility with v4.
> 
> **To preserve your custom sorting order, please update to v3.2 before installing v4.0.0.**

###      🩹 Fixes
- **Improved multi-selection dragging**:
    - Nested folders no longer escape to the parent level. (#113)
    - Prevented accidental nesting of selected items.
    - Disallowed dropping a multi-selection into folders that are part of the same selection.
- **Refined drop zone behavior**:
    - Drop zones are now properly cleaned up when a drag ends quickly.
    - Drop zones no longer appear in default sorting modes.
    - Fixed phantom drop zones appearing near empty folders.
- **Accurate drag tooltip**: the drag tooltip now always displays the correct target folder name.

###      🎨 Style
- **Clearer active drop indicator**: improved the visual clarity of the active drop zone for more precise positioning.

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--322-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.2.1...3.2.2)  •  _Dec 24, 2025_

>

###      🩹 Fixes
- **Fixed mobile folder expansion**: resolved issues where folders wouldn't open when tapped on mobile. ([#108](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/discussions/108))
- **Wider touch activation area**: expanded the drag zone width for more reliable dragging on mobile.

###      🎨 Style
- **Larger drag handles**: slightly increased size for drag handle icons.

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--321-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.2.0...3.2.1)  •  _Dec 13, 2025_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> The upcoming **v4.0.0** (planned for **Jan 5, 2026**) will introduce breaking changes, but **v3.2** includes automatic migration to the new settings format and ensures compatibility with v4.
> 
> **To preserve your custom sorting order, please update to v3.2 before installing v4.0.0.**

###      🎁 Features
- **Faster visual feedback**: drop zones now appear after a short mouse-hold delay, even before dragging begins. (#100)

###      🩹 Fixes
- **No accidental file opens**: tapping drag handles on mobile no longer accidentally opens files.
- **More stable mobile dragging**: prevented unexpected item movements when interacting with drag handles.

###      🎨 Style
- **Updated drag handle icon**: drag handles now use the more familiar 2×3 dot pattern.

###      🛠️ Maintenance
- **Settings migration**: settings storage has been updated with automatic migration to the new v4 format.

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--320-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.1.0...3.2.0)  •  _Dec 10, 2025_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
###      🎁 Features
- **Auto-scrolling during drag**: the explorer now scrolls automatically when dragging items near the edges, improving the mobile dragging UX.

###      🩹 Fixes
- **Fixed folder drop issues**: resolved problems with dropping items into folders that expand during dragging.
- **Cleaner drag handles**: drag handles no longer appear in views outside the file explorer.
- **Restored drop indicators**: drop indicators now properly reappear when dragging back into the explorer boundaries.
- **Consistent order saving**: custom order now always saves to settings file after drag completion, even if the item returns to its original position.

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--310-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.0.3...3.1.0)  •  _Nov 18, 2025_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
###      🩹 Fixes
- **Fixed folder order reset**: dragging into empty explorer areas no longer resets folder ordering.
- **Stable drop indicators**: drop indicators no longer disappear unexpectedly while scrolling the explorer during drag.

###      ⚡ Performance
- **Earlier no‑op detection**: redundant file rename calls are prevented sooner in the drag‑and‑drop flow.  
- **Single explorer size calculation**: explorer boundaries are now computed once at drag start instead of on every event.  
- **Static scroll caching**: basic caching reduces repeated lookups when the explorer scroll position is unchanged.

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--303-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.0.2...3.0.3)  •  _Nov 12, 2025_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
###      🩹 Fixes
- **Fixed drop zone display**: drop zones no longer appear inside the children of a folder being dragged.
- **Safe outside drops**: items are no longer moved when dropped outside the file explorer.
- **No auto‑expansion on touch**: dragged folders no longer expand unexpectedly during touch dragging.
- **No accidental scrolling**: the explorer now does not scroll while dragging on mobile.
- **Controlled folder expansion**: collapsed folders now expand with a short delay, preventing accidental expansion when dragging near them on mobile. (#90)

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--302-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.0.1...3.0.2)  •  _Nov 9, 2025_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
###      🩹 Fixes
- **Fixed dragging into empty folders**: notes can now be dragged correctly into empty folders. (#89)
- **Eliminated item jumping**: dragging an item to its current position no longer causes it to jump to the folder edges. (#88)
- **Improved drop zone visibility**: drop zones no longer incorrectly appear inside dragged folder on mobile devices.
- **Consistent drop indicator**: the drop indicator now reliably clears after drag completion.
- **Better touch experience**: added dedicated drag handles for touch devices to prevent accidental dragging during scrolling. (#91, #87)
- **Enhanced drag boundaries**: drag events now properly handle interactions outside the file explorer and resume smoothly when re-entering.

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--301-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/3.0.0...3.0.1)  •  _Nov 8, 2025_

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
###      🧨 BREAKING CHANGES
- The settings storage format has been almost completely redesigned. **Your existing settings, including custom order, will be reset.**
- The option to **disable dragging has been removed**, as the new engine minimizes accidental reordering.

###      🩹 Fixes
- **New DnD engine**: migrated from SortableJS to a custom drag‑and‑drop engine, fixing numerous bugs and reducing plugin size by 4x (now ~17kB).
- **Fixed keyboard selection issue**: resolved incorrect note highlighting when using keyboard navigation. (#46)
- **Fixed dragging from bottom folder**: notes can now be properly dragged from the bottommost folder to the root. (#48)
- **Reduced sync conflicts**: custom order now only saves to the settings file during dnd operations, not on file creation/deletion. (#73)

###      ⚡ Performance
- **Massive performance improvements**, especially noticeable in large vaults: the plugin now has minimal impact on Obsidian's performance since the new patching logic doesn't require loading all notes into DOM, including those outside the viewport. (#34, #49)

###      🎨 Styling
- **New Spotify-inspired drop indicator** replaces the old swap animations.
- **Visual drop zones** now show potential placement locations between notes during dragging.

#####      [_Release Changelog_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#--300-)  •  [_All Release Commits_](https://github.com/kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/2.5.1...3.0.0)  •  _Nov 6, 2025_

- Resolved an issue with **large gaps between notes** after switching workspace layout. (#54)

releases.description:
## [2.3.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/manual-sorting/compare/2.2.1...2.3.0) (2025-04-17)

### 🎁 Features
- The plugin now **remembers the last selected sorting mode and the `Dragging` state** between Obsidian restarts. (#38)
  _(Thanks to @Mara-Li for the proposed solution in PR #39!)_

### 🩹 Bug Fixes
- Fixed an Obsidian's internal issue where the **last selected built-in sorting mode wasn't preserved** after app reloads.
- The **`Manual Sorting` option now does nothing when it's already selected**, aligning with Obsidian’s native behavior.

### 🧹 Adjustments
- Clarified the confirmation message in the reset order modal to **indicate which sort order will be restored**.
![modal](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/75d48e25-9c6c-4e76-9729-97ee98c9b313)
- Renamed the repository from `obsidian-manual-sorting` to simply `manual-sorting`.  
  _(Old URLs will continue to redirect properly.)_

### 🎨 Styling
- Replaced the `Manual Sorting` menu option icon with a pin icon.
![new icon](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fdb92804-0a24-43b5-873b-31a369385909)

- Resolved a **dependency conflict** between `i18next` and `obsidian-typings`
- **Updated README**: modernized design, added **Installation** and **Credits** sections

releases.description:
## [2.1.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0) (2025-03-30)

### ✨ Highlights

- **Improved Performance**: Reordering of the subtree within the folder now occurs only after all child elements have been loaded. (thanks to @SublimePeace for bringing attention to this in #34)

- **Improved Name Conflict Handling**: Files and folders can now be safely moved, and their order will be correctly updated, when a name conflict occurs.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [2.0.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/compare/1.11.4...2.0.0) (2025-03-28)



### ⚡ Performance

- The plugin is now **faster and smoother** overall. The `FileOrderManager` class has been refactored to remove the operation queue, minimize unnecessary updates, and optimize file order processing.

### 🎁 Features

- The `📌 Manual sorting` option can now **be deselected**, restoring the previous sorting mode.
- The `🗑️ Reset order` option is now **always visible** regardless of the selected sorting mode.

### ⚠ BREAKING CHANGES

- Changed the **data storage format**. This allows storing additional data in the plugin’s storage, such as settings or paths for [folders excluded from manual sorting](https://github.com/Kh4f/manual-sorting/issues/14). 
- A migration method has been added to automatically convert existing data to the new format. However, this method **will be removed** in future versions.

---
> Big thanks to all bug reporters, especially @Paining1!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.11.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/compare/1.10.2...1.11.0) (2025-03-24)

### ✨ Highlights
- **Improved Auto-Scrolling** – Auto-scrolling now works even when dragging items beyond the file explorer’s boundaries. It also functions correctly with the "Auto-reveal file" option enabled and includes smoother transitions.
- **More Responsive Dragging** – The swapThreshold now dynamically adjusts, decreasing when a folder is near the dragged item. This makes it easier to drop files into folders without them bouncing around while still allowing for quick movement between files.
- **Slide Files into Empty Folders**

### 🚀 Features

* add autoscrolling when dragging items outside window ([3838dd6](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/3838dd66fc2e10bad392d6731b0c75806510fa26)), closes [#26](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/issues/26)
* add smooth scrolling and correct scroll position after manual sorting ([2970987](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/297098722a5fd736bbd7210cd7a89a0d87773c75))
* make `swapThreshold` dynamic based on adjacent folders ([25a8153](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/25a815387cbc9c5826a8bedeeaabed70c20f5aaf))


### 🩹 Bug Fixes

* **`waitForExplorer`:** ensure it resolves if explorer already exists ([53c823f](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/53c823f8afe6c63622ed03238f646c90a8e657a9))
* add `toggleSortingClass`  to apply styles for explorer only when manual sorting is enabled ([1c641ca](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/1c641ca566883be89c87be17845ce867d0e2f357))
* **order-manager:** call `updateOrder` instead of `updateVirtualDisplay` after removing misplaced element ([a5f0ee1](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/a5f0ee17be752a53147a46e0a3749d65ba2c27e1))

## [1.9.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/compare/1.8.2...1.9.0) (2025-03-15)

### ✨ Highlights

- **Caching**: Improved performance by adding caching to the order manager.
- **Fixed selection range issue**: You can now correctly select multiple files after manually sorting them.


### 🚀 Features

* **order-manager:** add caching ([aaed1ee](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/aaed1eee683f40d24f1fa5b75635c69b294b904d))
* **order-manager:** add getFlattenPaths method to retrieve all paths in a single array ([af1991c](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/af1991c1dc5726e36e28495775e13b08ec3fde78))


### 🩹 Bug Fixes

* ensure correct selection range after reordering by patching `handleItemSelection` ([1b69a9e](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/1b69a9ec842d2a57cf33acb426f1446da66480ab)), closes [#16](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/issues/16)
* prevent patching `detach` and `setFocusedItem` when manual sorting is disabled ([0deb1eb](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/0deb1ebe566e55711e62056de785529fdccada2f))


### 🧹 Adjustments

* **order-manager:** make _queueOperation generic to support different return types ([adbf3d2](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/adbf3d28fbfe6d973d43fc1dd95cf10d6c395d7e))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.8.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/compare/1.7.4...1.8.0) (2025-03-10)

### ✨ Highlights
- The UI now properly reflects the saved order by calling `updateVirtualDisplay` whenever the order is updated. Additionally, `restoreOrder` is now triggered every time a file is moved into a folder to ensure correct positioning.
- Improved **animation smoothness** for a better user experience.
- Refactored internal logic to remove reliance on the number of rendered elements when updating order. This prevents any issues related to `prevActualChildrenCount`, which was especially problematic on mobile devices.


### 🚀 Features

* add restoreOrder call after moving an element ([cdb7044](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/cdb7044a84e97e087c225ae9f5534e7b17a85a20))
* ensure ui matches saved order by calling updateVirtualDisplay in updateOrder ([ca9083b](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/ca9083b2b67d59a1493ca6dc2f7a49e804e8e8a2))

### 🧹 Adjustments

* **ui:** adjust animation speed for smoother transition ([31d355d](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/31d355d3d530d81bec4644457944254f85e5efd0))
* remove update and restore order logic based on rendered elements count ([cd66353](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/cd66353fd1924462186ccd1b4530f33e78dc119a))

## [1.7.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/compare/1.6.1...1.7.0) (2025-03-09)

### ✨ Highlights
**Folders now automatically collapse when dragged**. This fixes the issue where Obsidian would automatically expand folders while dragging, making it difficult to move them, especially when dealing with large folders.

### 🚀 Features

releases.description:
## [1.6.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/compare/1.5.0...1.6.0) (2025-03-09)

### 📱 Mobile Support  
Initial support for **mobile devices** has been added! You can now manually reorder files and folders in the Obsidian File Explorer on mobile, though this feature is still new and may require further refinements. 
 
If you encounter any issues on mobile, feel free to report them!  

### 🚀 Features

* add waitForExplorer method to ensure file explorer is loaded before patching ([10d460f](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/10d460f3237f572624d753a0f4ed64f6d08486fe))
* enable plugin for mobile devices ([3f08a57](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/3f08a5727479f34ade1c5e39b75a2d321baf92b1))
* manually trigger file renaming after moving between directories ([e9f94d8](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/e9f94d88e86cda357feba63d729798a7bbd86355))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

### 🚀 Features

* **drag-and-drop:** prevent folder from moving when dragging item over it by adding swapThreshold ([de043d1](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/de043d133389c51b5d0e6c6502fa8d2d903464ee)), closes [#10](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/issues/10)


### 🩹 Bug Fixes

* **debug:** correct debug message from 'after' to 'before' ([e796833](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/e796833f7c84c477456ae80c56084e72d9e94e8e))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.0](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/compare/1.3.7...1.4.0) (2025-03-08)

### ✨ Highlights
- **OrderManager overhaul**: Now indexes the order of **all files and folders**, even if no manual sorting has been applied. This improves reliability in maintaining the expected folder structure.
- **Improved persistence**: If the file structure changes while the plugin is disabled, previous ordering is **preserved as much as possible**. New files/folders will be **appended to the bottom** of their directory.

### 🚀 Features

* **order-manager:** rewrite OrderManager to index entire file structure and seamlessly update order after external changes ([786f924](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/786f924bccb86ef647e899d4002189389deaa5e1))

### 🩹 Bug Fixes

* ensure files are truly deleted before updating order ([29f5b71](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/29f5b7128463fba201448a7dab082c439c087bea))
* **menu:** correct variable name from 'openManuButton' to 'openMenuButton' ([f8385d5](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/f8385d52ddc935bb17ddcbdbdb021cba92a19d1a))
* override detach function to prevent deletion of offscreen files ([f296b9e](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/f296b9e68c32268df654878544d777cf25e177c8))
* **ui:** reduce large empty gaps between file structure elements ([b1ab442](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/b1ab4424021aacf34e40ca1cf0790dbe6058f623))

### 🧹 Adjustments

* replace itemInstance?.children with itemIsFolder variable ([752e70d](https://github.com/Kh4f/obsidian-manual-sorting/commit/752e70d1bb223cc44a83a1728f785c8b7e433494))
